code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let t = tokens.get(i)
  match t
  when Some(s)
    match string.parse_int(s)
    when Some(n)
      nums = list.push(nums, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut sorted = true
mut j = 1
while j < nums.len()
  let a = match nums.get(j - 1)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let b = match nums.get(j)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b < a
    sorted = false
  end
  j = j + 1
end

if sorted
  println("YES")
else
  println("NO")
end
